rulings.Case Title: MICKEY Y WONG VS. DORIS WONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mickey Wongs Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings (Bo Kin Wong)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 25, 2017, line 1. PLAINTIFF MICKEY WONG, YIU CHEONG CONSTRUCTION CO INC.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings (Bo Kin Wong) DENIED. Operative cross-complaint contained sufficient allegations of ultimate facts to support causes of action subject to this motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICKEY Y WONG VS. DORIS WONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings (Doris Wong)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 25, 2017, line 1. PLAINTIFF MICKEY WONG, YIU CHEONG CONSTRUCTION CO INC.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings (Doris Wong) DENIED. All causes of action at issue are sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHRIS NORRIS et al VS. NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Relief From Default And Leave To Defend
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 25, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC's Motion For Relief From Default And Leave To Defend GRANTED. Defendant to prepare order and file its proposed Verified Answer forthwith. The Court notes that Plaintiff's opposition is late and that no courtesy copy of opposition was delivered to department 501. Failure to comply with CCP 1005 and SFLR 2.7B in future may result in motions being treated as unopposed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JESUS THOMAS SOTO VS. PETER LOUIE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Terms Of Settlement Agreement Or Alternatively To Vacate Stay On Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 25, 2017, line 3. PLAINTIFF JESUS SOTO's Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Terms Of Settlement Agreement Or Alternatively To Vacate Stay On Judgment GRANTED. Defendants are in breach of the settlement agreement for failure to address the existing NOVs and for failure to address the Notice of short-term rental violation encumbering the property. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RICKY CAMACHO VS. STEVEN MIYAKE ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 25, 2017, line 4. Defendant Steven Miyake'S Motion To Compel Further Deposition Of Paul Behrend And For Sanctions OFF CALENDAR, per request of the moving party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VANCE DRISCOLL ET AL VS. 1501 CALIFORNIA, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens
